title: The Girls in Smaland
writer: Ragnar Arvedson, Schamyl Bauman, Karl Gunnarson
actors: Sickan Carlsson, Åke Grönberg, Sigge Fürst
plot: Gunnar Carlman has heard about the beautiful girls in Småland and takes the train to Vimmerby to meet them himself. He gets a job as a farm-hand at the mean-spirited farmer Jönsson's farm. It doesn't take long before he has had en...
